testcase.name: test_reveal_insufficient_credits_402

failure.message: AssertionError: expected 402 (insufficient credits) or 429 (daily limit) after 6 attempts, never observed. Last status was different. assert (False or False)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase7b_security.py:210: in test_reveal_insufficient_credits_402 assert seen_402 or seen_429, ( E AssertionError: expected 402 (insufficient credits) or 429 (daily limit) after 6 attempts, never observed. Last status was different. E assert (False or False)

testcase.name: test_reveal_success_then_daily_429
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase7b_security.py:231: in test_reveal_success_then_daily_429 assert r.status_code == 200, f"first reveal: {r.status_code} {r.text}" E AssertionError: first reveal: 500 {"detail":"Payment failed. Please try again."} E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_cors_not_wildcard

failure.message: AssertionError: CORS must not be wildcard: * assert '*' != '*'

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_phase7b_security.py:393: in test_cors_not_wildcard assert origin != "*", f"CORS must not be wildcard: {origin}" E AssertionError: CORS must not be wildcard: * E assert '*' != '*'
